prompt: Conduct a retrospective after completing a 6-month project delivery.
assertions: gathers feedback from all team roles
identifies what worked well and what didn't

prompt: Retrospective for a failed project that was cancelled at 60% completion.
assertions: creates safe space for honest reflection
extracts prevention strategies for future projects

prompt: Mid-project retrospective for a team that hasn't done one before.
assertions: establishes ground rules for constructive feedback

prompt: Synthesize lessons from 3 completed projects to identify patterns.
